author: claude-sonnet-4.5
source_text: billing-api deployed to staging at version 1.7.2. Three pods are healthy and latency p95 is 240ms. No rollback was triggered.
clone_text:
^grammar:v0.3
^declare:level=L1
@billing-api := svc:billing-api/staging
@v := 1.7.2
get @billing-api status ^3
run deploy @v -> done ^3
say pods healthy ^3
